guardrails.body: Never attempt to identify this species based on color alone.
guardrails.title: Identification Limit

guardrails.body: Avoid any specimen showing a prominent volva or ring
guardrails.title: Strict Protocol

guardrails.body: If ingestion is suspected, contact emergency services immediately.
guardrails.title: Emergency Action

signals.body: Identify the distinctive bulbous base and ring structure.
signals.title: Morphological Markers

signals.body: Extreme toxicity levels require immediate medical intervention if ingested.
signals.title: Lethal Toxicity

signals.body: Amanita phalloides contains amatoxins that cause irreversible organ failure.
signals.title: Biological Threat

signals.body: Mistaking this species for edible varieties is a fatal error.
signals.title: Critical Awareness

summary: The Death Cap (Kärpässieni): Critical toxicity awareness.
title: Critical Risk: The Death Cap
